languages.text: "Проклятом Омниссией, порабощающем изначальную функцию ксеноконструкте!" — {n}поправляет Альва-9. В ее голосе гремит недовольство.{/n}
"One xenoconstruct cursed by the Omnissiah and that subjugates this station's original function!" {n}corrects Alva-9. Discontent rattles in her voice.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Проклятом Омниссией, порабощающем изначальную функцию ксеноконструкте!" — {n}поправляет Альва-9. В ее голосе гремит недовольство.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "One xenoconstruct cursed by the Omnissiah and that subjugates this station's original function!" {n}corrects Alva-9. Discontent rattles in her voice.{/n}
"One xenoconstruct cursed by the Omnissiah and that subjugates this station's original function!" {n}corrects Alva-9. Discontent rattles in her voice.{/n}
"One xenoconstruct cursed by the Omnissiah and that subjugates this station's original function!" {n}corrects Alva-9. Discontent rattles in her voice.{/n}

languages.text: 「オムニシアが呪った異星建造物で、この基地の本来の機能を奪うものだ！」{n}アルバ-9はそれを訂正する。彼女の声には不満がこもっている。{/n}
languages.original_text: "One xenoconstruct cursed by the Omnissiah and that subjugates this station's original function!" {n}corrects Alva-9. Discontent rattles in her voice.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「オムニシアが呪った異星建造物で、この基地の本来の機能を奪うものだ！」{n}アルバ-9はそれを訂正する。彼女の声には不満がこもっている。{/n}

languages.text: «¡De una creación de xenoingeniería maldita por el Omnissiah, que se apropia de la función original de la estación!», {n}corrige Alva-9 con evidente enfado.{/n}
languages.original_text: "One xenoconstruct cursed by the Omnissiah and that subjugates this station's original function!" {n}corrects Alva-9. Discontent rattles in her voice.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «¡De una creación de xenoingeniería maldita por el Omnissiah, que se apropia de la función original de la estación!», {n}corrige Alva-9 con evidente enfado.{/n}

languages.text: “一个遭欧姆尼赛亚诅咒，还篡改了本星站原生功能的异形造物！”{n}阿尔瓦-9纠正道，声音里带着不满的震颤。{/n}
languages.original_text: "One xenoconstruct cursed by the Omnissiah and that subjugates this station's original function!" {n}corrects Alva-9. Discontent rattles in her voice.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “一个遭欧姆尼赛亚诅咒，还篡改了本星站原生功能的异形造物！”{n}阿尔瓦-9纠正道，声音里带着不满的震颤。{/n}

languages.text: "Von einem vom Omnissiah verfluchten Xenokonstrukt, das die ursprüngliche Funktion der Station unterwandert!",{n}korrigiert dich Alva-9. In ihre Stimme mischt sich Unzufriedenheit.{/n}
languages.original_text: "One xenoconstruct cursed by the Omnissiah and that subjugates this station's original function!" {n}corrects Alva-9. Discontent rattles in her voice.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Von einem vom Omnissiah verfluchten Xenokonstrukt, das die ursprüngliche Funktion der Station unterwandert!",{n}korrigiert dich Alva-9. In ihre Stimme mischt sich Unzufriedenheit.{/n}

languages.text: "Hermesih'in lanetlediği ve bu istasyonun asıl işlevine boyun eğdiren bir zeno yapısı!" {n}Alva-9'un sesinde hoşnutsuzluk tıkırdıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "One xenoconstruct cursed by the Omnissiah and that subjugates this station's original function!" {n}corrects Alva-9. Discontent rattles in her voice.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Hermesih'in lanetlediği ve bu istasyonun asıl işlevine boyun eğdiren bir zeno yapısı!" {n}Alva-9'un sesinde hoşnutsuzluk tıkırdıyor.{/n}

languages.text: « Une xénocréation maudite par l'Omnimessie qui subjugue la fonction initiale de cette station ! » {n}corrige Alva-9 d'une voix contrariée.{/n}
languages.original_text: "One xenoconstruct cursed by the Omnissiah and that subjugates this station's original function!" {n}corrects Alva-9. Discontent rattles in her voice.{/n}
